docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACHADO, ADRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST LEGAL SUPPORT SERVICES, LLC, A CALIF. LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
